use_cases: Display loading or processing status in applications
Show form or task completion percentage
Indicate file upload or download progress
Visualize data processing or analysis completion
Represent workflow or pipeline stage progression
ai_summary: A minimalist progress bar component built on Radix UI primitives. Displays a horizontal progress indicator with smooth CSS transform-based animation and rounded styling. Suitable for indicating completion status across various contexts including loading states, form progress, and task completion tracking.
